case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. COMMERCIAL AND INTERIOR CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL AND INTERIOR CONSTRUCTION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON MAY 31. 1998 $8,639.91 RENT, $166.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,805.91, LEASE FORFEITED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED MAR-31-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL AND INTERIOR CONSTRUCTION
